I won the awards.
unbelivable...

Thank you so much to the judges and the organizers for this incredible honor.

Huge thanks to my boss for supporting the vision several years; to my amazing team (Advant Analytics Tactics), this award truly belongs to all of us, and thanks to Fu Jen Catholic University for encouraging me to do industry-university cooperation.

Leading R&D and taking products to market in smart manufacturing, let’s just say... it hasn’t exactly been a walk in the park. But moments like this remind me why I keep going — it’s all worth it.

This award truly lifts my spirits. I’ll keep moving forward — with passion, purpose, and maybe just a bit of stubbornness to stand by what I believe in.
